ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the customer */,
  "ship_country" TEXT /* Country where the order is shipped */,
  "ship_city" TEXT /* City where the order is shipped */,
  "ship_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping recipient */,
  "ship_address" TEXT /* Address of the shipping recipient */,
  "company_email" TEXT /* Email of the company associated with the order */,
  "company_agent" TEXT /* Name of the company agent handling the order */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company placing the order */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the company */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the shipping location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the shipping location */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the payment was made */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the shipping location */,
  "total_payment" REAL /* Total amount paid for the order */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Status of the order (e.g., 1 for pending, 5 for completed) */,
  "type" INTEGER /* Type of the order (e.g., 1 for standard, 2 for expedited) */,
  "actions" TEXT /* Actions taken on the order (e.g., None, Shipped, Canceled) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, paid, failed) */,
  "shipment_status" TEXT /* Shipping status of the order */,
  "cancel_reason" TEXT /* Reason for order cancellation */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language used for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_company_email FOREIGN KEY ("company_email") REFERENCES companies ("company_email")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "company_email" TEXT /* Email of the company */,
  "company_agent" TEXT /* Name of the company agent handling the orders */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the company */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL for the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order associated with the shipment */,
  "ship_country" TEXT /* Country where the shipment is sent */,
  "ship_city" TEXT /* City where the shipment is sent */,
  "ship_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping recipient */,
  "ship_address" TEXT /* Address of the shipping recipient */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the shipping location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the shipping location */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was sent */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Status of the shipment (e.g., 1 for in transit, 5 for delivered) */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier used for the shipment */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date for the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order associated with the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipment_status_history" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipment associated with the status update */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Status of the shipment (e.g., 1 for in transit, 5 for delivered) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time the status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id", "timestamp")
)
